---
title: "Метаанализ"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r, markdown_settings, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE)
```

```{r, installing-libraries, include = FALSE}
#install.packages(c("metafor", "clubSandwich"))
```

Загрузим данные:

```{r, data-load}
dataset <- read.csv("Метаанализ.csv", sep = ",")
head(dataset, 5)
```

Проведём метаанализ:

```{r, multilevel-model}
library(metafor)

fit <- rma.mv(
	yi = computed.effect.size,
	V = computed.standard.error^2,
	data = dataset,
	random = list(`Component 1` = ~1 | Автор/Мышца/Головка),
	method = 'REML',
	test = 't',
	level = 95
)

fit <- robust(
	fit,
	cluster = Автор,
	clubSandwich = TRUE,
    adjust = TRUE
)

print(fit)
```

Построим лесной график:

```{r, forest-plot}
forest(fit)
```
